result.summary: Found 3 major visual issues: truncated navigation text, partially visible game cards cut off on the right edge, and potential responsive layout problems affecting content visibility.

issues.description: Navigation item 'Hot Gam' is truncated and should read 'Hot Games' - text is cut off on the right side
issues.suggestion: Adjust the navigation layout to accommodate full text labels, or implement horizontal scrolling if needed. Consider responsive design adjustments for smaller viewports.

issues.description: Game cards in 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section are partially cut off on the right edge - only partial images and text are visible (e.g., 'MAGNI' card is incomplete)
issues.suggestion: Fix the carousel/grid container width and overflow properties. Ensure all game cards are fully visible within the viewport or properly implement a scrollable carousel with appropriate controls.

issues.description: Game cards in 'Top Played New Games' section also show partial content cut off on the right side
issues.suggestion: Apply consistent responsive layout fixes across all game sections. Test on different screen sizes to ensure content is not cut off and all cards are fully visible.
